installConfigs.instructions: Connects to the hosted Web3Auth MCP server at https://mcp.web3auth.io. If authentication is required for your account, add "serverAuthToken": "<your-web3auth-token>" to the server config.
Connects to the hosted Web3Auth MCP server at https://mcp.web3auth.io. If authentication is required for your account, add "serverAuthToken": "<your-web3auth-token>" to the server config.
